title: syringa formosissima var. hirsuta
intro: Syringa formosissima var. hirsuta, also known as the hairy lilac, is a variety of flowering plant in the olive family that is native to China and Taiwan. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Syringa formosissima var. hirsuta include reducing fever, relieving pain, and soothing respiratory issues, making it a popular remedy for colds and flu. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
